yourCommunities.subtitle: A member-scoped feed shell. Keep it tight on mobile and let the sidebar carry the heavier navigation.
yourCommunities.title: Your Communities

post.commentsBody: Replies are not loaded in this web build yet.

onboarding.description: Three-step onboarding route for Reddit verification, handle selection, and community suggestions.
onboarding.title: Finish setting up your Pirate identity

auth.body: Sign in to create or resume a Pirate browser session. Once connected, this page shows your current account and onboarding status.
auth.description: Account entry point for browser sign-in, session state, and verification routing.
auth.title: Account

authDevice.description: Browser handoff route for terminal or device login. The page signs in with Privy, checks onboarding, and authorizes the waiting device session.
authDevice.title: Device auth

inbox.body: Use this page to inspect your current browser session, verification state, and onboarding readiness.
inbox.description: Account-scoped status surface for verification, onboarding, and system events.
inbox.title: Inbox

createCommunity.description: Namespace-backed community creation flow with live account verification and submission wiring.
createCommunity.title: Create a community

notFound.body: The current web shell covers home, feeds, communities, posts, profiles, onboarding, account, inbox, and community creation.
notFound.title: Route not found
